title: Hotel Check-In Process for Egypt Operations
trigger: Guest arrival at the hotel front desk for check-in.

steps.title: Greet the Guest
steps.action: Welcome the guest warmly and inquire about their reservation details. Confirm the guest's identity by checking their ID or passport.

steps.title: Verify Reservation Details
steps.action: Access the PMS to verify the reservation details including room type, dates of stay, and any special requests. Confirm with the guest.

steps.title: Process Payment
steps.action: Request payment for the stay if not already prepaid. Ensure compliance with PCI-DSS standards during payment processing.

steps.title: Assign Room and Issue Key
steps.action: Assign a room in the PMS and issue a key card. Provide the guest with information about hotel amenities and services.

steps.title: Escort to Room (if necessary)
steps.action: Offer to have a concierge or bellboy escort the guest to their room, especially if they have luggage or require assistance.

steps.title: Resolve Reservation Issues
steps.action: If there is a discrepancy in the reservation details, attempt to resolve it by checking with the guest and the reservation system. Offer alternatives if necessary.

steps.title: Escalate Unresolved Issues
steps.action: If the reservation issue cannot be resolved, escalate to the Front Desk Manager for further action.

description: This playbook outlines the standard operating procedure for the check-in process at hotels in Egypt, ensuring a seamless and efficient experience for guests while maintaining operational excellence.
